title: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Visakhapatnam is a city in Andhra Pradesh with a population of 2,050,000. A coastal city known for its beautiful beaches, natural harbor, submarine museum, and growing IT and manufacturing sectors.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
